findings.title: Board e2e is a stub, not the required REQ-5 board-down/board-up proof
findings.description: The board-down test only calls runBoardIndependentVoiceFlow(), which returns a fixed ok result from src/obs/board.ts without exercising the canonical REQ-5 voice loop. The board-up test fabricates four trace records inline and reconstructs those, so it does not prove reconstruction from traces persisted by a live run. AC16.2 and AC16.3 require the full REQ-5 scenario with the board server down, then board up with persisted traces matching the live run.

findings.title: Cross-component reconstruction is only tested against synthetic JSON, not real Cue and Smithers traces
findings.description: The claimed causal-chain join over Cue observations/decisions/actions and Smithers traces uses crossComponentFixture(), which constructs idealized JSON strings in the test. It never reads recorded Cue JSONL or Smithers-side traces from the dependency evidence bundle, so the test can pass while real trace shapes or correlationId/upid placement remain incompatible.

findings.title: P-OTEL probe does not exercise self-hosted Langfuse OTLP and failed in reviewer run
findings.description: The probe starts a local Bun HTTP server and treats any 200 response as success instead of exporting to a Langfuse-compatible self-hosted OTLP endpoint. In this reviewer environment, bun test poc/p-otel.test.ts failed to bind port 0, while the ticket lists this informational probe as part of verification.
